basic_details.short_information: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 170 Fireman posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official UPSSSC website, upsssc.gov.in. The last date to submit the application form is 29-06-2026.

how_to_apply: Apply only through official website upsssc.gov.in using PET-2025 Registration Number and OTP.
Fill personal details, educational qualifications, select posts and preferences.
Take printout of submitted application after successful fee reconciliation.
Modification of application possible only till 06/07/2026.
seo_tags: UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 170 Posts
